data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of invoice generation from an approved timesheet. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes the process but does not provide specific evidence of the API endpoints or the state checks necessary to validate that the requirement is satisfied, indicating a gap in the evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or state checks confirming invoice generation from approved timesheet.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for invoice generation validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that invoices can be generated from approved timesheets.
